Describe the changing street scenes and vehicle traffic observed from the beginning to the end of the visible footage.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a hazy street scene with a mosque and auto-rickshaws is visible; at 8s, the view shifts to a Gothic building with black and yellow taxis; at 9s, a red bus with BEST writing drives past the clock tower; at 11s, men playing cricket appear near a red sandstone wall while traffic continues.

question: Describe the sequence of major landmarks and flags displayed during the video duration.
canonical_answer: At 6s, tall white minarets stand behind a busy road; at 8s, an Indian flag flies atop a central clock tower on a stone building; at 10s, the clock tower remains visible behind cricket players; at 17s, a green and white flag with a crescent moon waves against a building.
